languages.text: [Прикрыть нос платком] "Какие... пронзительные ароматы и уродливые туши. Что за гнусности здесь творятся?"
[Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"
languages.original_text: [Прикрыть нос платком] "Какие... пронзительные ароматы и уродливые туши. Что за гнусности здесь творятся?"

traits.locale_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"
[Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"
[Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

languages.text: [鼻をハンカチで覆う]「こんな…強烈な臭い、そして不快な死体。一体、ここではどんな恐ろしい行為が行われているのだろうか？」
languages.original_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

traits.locale_text: [鼻をハンカチで覆う]「こんな…強烈な臭い、そして不快な死体。一体、ここではどんな恐ろしい行為が行われているのだろうか？」

languages.text: 【用手帕捂住鼻子】“如此……刺鼻的气味与骇人的残骸。你们究竟在做什么令人发指的勾当？”
languages.original_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

traits.locale_text: 【用手帕捂住鼻子】“如此……刺鼻的气味与骇人的残骸。你们究竟在做什么令人发指的勾当？”

languages.text: [Cubrirte la nariz con un pañuelo] «Un... hedor repugnante y unos cadáveres horrendos. ¿Qué blasfemias se realizan aquí?».
languages.original_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

traits.locale_text: [Cubrirte la nariz con un pañuelo] «Un... hedor repugnante y unos cadáveres horrendos. ¿Qué blasfemias se realizan aquí?».

languages.text: [Deine Nase mit einem Taschentuch bedecken] "Was für ein ... widerlicher Gestank und unansehnliche Kadaver. Was für eine Teufelei ist das hier?"
languages.original_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

traits.locale_text: [Deine Nase mit einem Taschentuch bedecken] "Was für ein ... widerlicher Gestank und unansehnliche Kadaver. Was für eine Teufelei ist das hier?"

languages.text: [Vous couvrir le nez avec un mouchoir] « La vue de ces carcasses me répugne autant que leur odeur. À quels actes infâmes vous adonnez-vous ici ? »
languages.original_text: [Cover your nose with a handkercher] "Such... pungent odours and unsightly carcasses. What heinous acts are taking place here?"

traits.locale_text: [Vous couvrir le nez avec un mouchoir] « La vue de ces carcasses me répugne autant que leur odeur. À quels actes infâmes vous adonnez-vous ici ? »

languages.text: [Burnunu mendille kapat] "Ne kadar... Keskin kokular ve çirkin cesetler. Burada ne tür iğrenç eylemler gerçekleşiyor?"
